footer.description: The fluid architect for e-commerce financial intelligence. Build your empire on solid data.

hero.description: The high-end architect for your e-commerce financial health. Centralize orders, inventory, and logistics in one fluid experience.

features.title: Precision Features
features.subtitle: Designed for scale, architected for simplicity.
features.orderBody: Track each order from purchase through confirmation and final delivery with less manual follow-up.
features.financeBody: Monitor cash flow, margins, and spending from one view built for daily decision-making.
features.storesBody: Launch and manage multiple stores from one workspace without losing operational clarity.
features.carriersBody: Integrate delivery companies into your process so order handoff and tracking stay smooth.
features.staffBody: Add employees, assign tasks, and define permissions with clear control over who does what.
features.stockBody: Watch inventory levels, catch low-stock products early, and keep every item organized.
features.pixelBody: Connect ad pixels across your stores for automatic tracking and stronger campaign feedback.
features.analyticsBody: Use sharper reporting to measure growth, review performance, and move with confidence.
features.recoveryBody: Win back abandoned demand and detect duplicate or suspicious orders before they drain effort.

workflow.step1Body: Link your online store, warehouse, and delivery partners in minutes. No technical skills required.
workflow.step2Body: See all your orders, stock, and shipments in one clear dashboard. Know exactly what is happening in real-time.
workflow.step3Body: Use clear reports to cut shipping costs and restock at the right time. Stop guessing, start growing.

radar.title: Stop Money Leaks
radar.description: Our system automatically tracks your orders, shipping costs, and returns to uncover hidden losses. Keep more of the money you earn.
radar.point2: See which products are actually losing you money

bento.carriersDescription: Connect and compare rates from Yalidine, ZR Express, and others instantly.
bento.profitDescription: Stop looking at revenue. Start looking at what you actually keep.

audience.title: Built for merchants at every stage.
audience.subtitle: Whether you are starting small or operating at scale, the platform stays practical and clear.
audience.segment1Body: For merchants launching their first store and needing one clean place to manage daily operations.
audience.segment2Body: For teams that need clearer roles, smoother order handling, and more control as volume increases.
audience.segment3Body: For merchants running multiple stores and warehouses without wanting separate tools for each one.
audience.segment4Body: For businesses handling large order flow and looking to protect margins while scaling with confidence.

beforeAfter.title: See the difference in daily operations.
beforeAfter.subtitle: The value is not abstract. It changes how the business runs every day.
beforeAfter.before1: Orders, stock, and delivery updates are scattered across too many places.
beforeAfter.before2: You can see sales, but not your real net profit after costs and returns.
beforeAfter.before3: Daily operations depend on manual follow-up, spreadsheets, and guesswork.
beforeAfter.after1: Orders, inventory, carriers, and finances live in one operational view.
beforeAfter.after2: You know what you are actually earning and where money is leaking.
beforeAfter.after3: Your team works faster with clearer workflows, fewer mistakes, and better decisions.

pricing.title: Choose the Right Plan
pricing.subtitle: Clear pricing built for merchants at every stage of growth.
pricing.welcomeDescription: A 15-day free offer to explore the platform and organize your workflow before upgrading.
pricing.basicDescription: Your ideal plan to start selling with confidence and without complexity.
pricing.basicFeature3: Manage all your orders from one screen
pricing.basicFeature4: Stock alerts to avoid running out of products
pricing.proDescription: The preferred choice for merchants who want to scale professionally and avoid losses.
pricing.proFeature3: Choose the fastest and cheapest carrier automatically
pricing.proFeature4: A simple system to reduce and manage returns
pricing.ultraDescription: For larger businesses and heavy order volume without limits.
pricing.ultraFeature2: Manage and track multiple warehouses at once
pricing.ultraFeature3: Custom API integration for your company systems
pricing.ultraFeature4: A personal account manager on WhatsApp

finalCta.title: Start Growing Today
finalCta.description: Join thousands of merchants who stopped guessing and started knowing their true net profit.

hero.description: Manage orders, delivery, stock, and profit from one simple place.

overview.title: Everything your business needs
overview.subtitle: Simple tools for the daily work that keeps your store moving.

cards.storefrontBody: Set up your store in a simple way and keep things easy to manage.
cards.shippingBody: Send orders to delivery companies faster and follow each shipment easily.
cards.financeBody: See what you really earn after delivery costs, returns, and other expenses.
cards.inventoryBody: Follow your stock and get alerts before products run out.
cards.teamBody: Give each team member only the access they need to do their work.
cards.insightsBody: See simple numbers and reports that help you make better decisions.

highlights.title: Why merchants choose Arba7i
highlights.item1: One place for your store, orders, delivery, and profit.
highlights.item2: Made for COD sellers and the way local delivery works.
highlights.item3: Less confusion, fewer mistakes, and better follow-up every day.

metrics.title: Built to make daily work easier
metrics.subtitle: Less manual work, fewer mistakes, and clearer numbers.

admin.title: Track your business easily
admin.description: Follow what is happening in your business and keep your team on the same page.
admin.item1Body: See sales, delivery costs, and returns from one dashboard.
admin.item2Body: Keep marketing, stock, and daily costs organized in the right place.
admin.item3Body: Set clear permissions so each person sees only what they need.

finalCta.title: Run your store with more control
finalCta.description: Bring your orders, delivery, team, and numbers into one clear system.

hero.description: Pick the plan that fits your business today and upgrade when you need more.

comparison.title: Compare plans easily
comparison.subtitle: See what each plan gives you in simple words.

faq.title: Pricing questions
faq.subtitle: Simple answers before you start.
faq.a1: Yes. You can move to another plan when your business grows.
faq.q2: Do I need a long contract?
faq.a2: No. Start with what fits you now and change later if needed.
faq.q3: Which plan is best for many warehouses?
faq.a3: Ultra is best if you manage many warehouses and need more support.

finalCta.title: Start with the plan that fits you
finalCta.description: You do not need complicated tools to start managing your COD business better.

hero.description: Arba7i helps merchants manage daily work without stress or messy tools.

mission.title: Why Arba7i exists
mission.body: Many sellers lose time and money because their orders, delivery, stock, and profit are split across too many tools.

values.title: The ideas behind the product
values.subtitle: We keep the product simple, useful, and honest.
values.item1Body: You should understand your orders, costs, and profit without confusion.
values.item2Body: We build what merchants really need in daily work.
values.item3Body: We design the platform around real sellers, teams, and warehouses.
values.item4Body: The platform should stay easy and reliable even when work gets busy.

philosophy.title: Simple system
philosophy.body1: We want the platform to feel easy from the first day, not heavy or confusing.
philosophy.body2: As your business grows, the system should stay clear and easy to use as you grow.

team.title: Built for real daily work
team.description: Arba7i is shaped around the real problems of COD sellers, stock teams, and delivery follow-up.

finalCta.title: Use tools that keep things clear
finalCta.description: As your business grows, your system should help you stay organized, not slow you down.

hero.description: If you have a question about the platform, pricing, or setup, talk to us.

channels.salesBody: Ask us which plan fits your business and what you need to get started.
channels.supportBody: Get help with setup, orders, delivery, stock, or anything blocking your work.
channels.partnerBody: Contact us if you want to work together on integrations or business partnerships.

help.title: Need a quick answer?
help.description: If your question is common, the help center may give you the answer faster.

commitment.title: Our commitment
commitment.body: We try to answer business questions within one working day.

hero.title: How can we help?
hero.description: Find clear answers about setup, pricing, delivery companies, and account access.
hero.searchPlaceholder: Search for articles, guides, and answers...

categories.item1Body: We help you open your account, add your store, and start using Arba7i the right way.
categories.item2Body: Get help with plans, invoices, payments, and changing your subscription.
categories.item3Body: Get help connecting delivery companies and understanding shipment flow.
categories.item4Body: Fix login issues and control what your team can see and do.
categories.item5Body: Ask us about tracking setup and the tools you want to connect.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Simple answers to common questions.
faq.q1: How do I set up my store for the first time?
faq.a1: Create your workspace, add your store, and connect your delivery companies before you start taking orders.
faq.q2: Can I change my plan later?
faq.a2: Yes. You can upgrade when your business grows or change your billing from your account settings.
faq.q3: Where can I manage team access?
faq.a3: You can add team members and control what your team sees from the admin area.
faq.a4: Use the contact page or send us an email at webdevyns@gmail.com.

support.title: Still need help?
support.description: If your issue is not answered here, send us a message and we will guide you step by step.

finalCta.title: Start with support close to you
finalCta.description: Start with a simple system and keep support close while your business grows.

hero.title: Privacy Policy
hero.description: This page explains what data we collect, why we collect it, and how we protect it.

sections.section1Body1: We collect the information you give us when you create an account, contact us, or use the platform.
sections.section1Body2: This may include your business details, order activity, and technical data needed to run the service.
sections.section2Body1: We use data to run the platform, keep accounts safe, improve the service, and help merchants.
sections.section2Body2: We do not sell your data or use your business activity to build ad profiles.
sections.section3Quote: We do not sell your personal data or business data.
sections.section3Body1: We only share data with service providers, legal authorities when required, or trusted partners needed to run the service.
sections.section4Body1: We use technical and internal protections to keep your account and business data safe.
sections.section4Card1Body: Sensitive data is protected when it moves between your device and our systems.
sections.section4Card2Body: We watch important systems and limit high-level access.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.description: Depending on the law, you may ask to see, fix, delete, or export your personal data.
rights.item1Body: Request a copy of the personal data associated with your account.
rights.item2Body: Ask us to fix wrong or incomplete information.
rights.item3Body: Ask us to delete your account and related personal data when allowed.
rights.item4Body: Ask for your data in a format you can use.

contact.title: Privacy questions
contact.description: If you have any questions about privacy or your data, contact our team.

hero.title: Terms and Conditions
hero.description: These are the basic rules for using Arba7i.

toc.title: Navigation
toc.cardBody: Our team can explain these rules in simple words.

sections.section1Body1: These terms explain how you can use Arba7i and its tools.
sections.section1Body2: When we say platform, user, or services, we mean the Arba7i system and the people using it.
sections.section2Body1: You are responsible for keeping your account information correct and your login details safe.
sections.section2Body2: If account access is shared in the wrong way or abused, we may suspend the account.
sections.section2Note: We may ask for business verification when needed for security or legal reasons.
sections.section3Body1: Paid plans are charged by the billing cycle you choose. Taxes or payment-provider rules may also apply.
sections.section3Point1: Fees are charged in advance based on your plan.
sections.section3Point3: Your subscription renews until you cancel it.
sections.section4Body1: Arba7i owns the platform, the software, the design, and the brand assets.
sections.section4Body2: Your business data stays yours. Our software and platform stay ours.
sections.section4Quote: Your data stays yours. The platform stays ours.
sections.section5Body1: We may stop or suspend access if these terms are broken or if there is legal or operational risk.
sections.section5Body2: You can stop using the service and close your account through the available account settings.
sections.section6Body1: We work to keep the service available, but maintenance, outside services, or force majeure can affect availability.
sections.section6Body2: You are still responsible for your business decisions, legal compliance, and how you use the platform.

finalCta.title: Have questions about these terms?
finalCta.description: Contact us if you want help understanding billing, account rules, or responsibilities.

login.title: Welcome back
login.description: Log in to manage your store, orders, and daily operations from one place.

register.title: Create your account
register.description: Open your account and start managing your orders, delivery, and profit in one simple dashboard.
register.identityDescription: Add your name and choose the username for your account.
register.contactDescription: Enter the email and phone number linked to this account.
register.securityDescription: Choose a password and confirm it before creating your account.
register.usernameBad: Use only letters, numbers, and underscores

forgetPassword.title: Reset password
forgetPassword.description: Enter the email linked to your account and we will send you a secure reset link.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.description: Choose a new password for your account and use it at your next login.

completeProfile.title: Complete your profile
completeProfile.description: Add the last account details you need before entering the dashboard.
completeProfile.usernameHint: Use only letters, numbers, and underscores.

dashboardPage.welcomeDesc: Here is a quick view of your store's health and activity today.
dashboardPage.noStoreDesc: Please run the seeder or create a store to view your dashboard.
dashboardPage.setupDesc: You are a few steps away from launching.
dashboardPage.allClear: All clear! No risky orders detected.

categoriesPage.title: Categories
categoriesPage.desc: Keep your products grouped in a simple way.
categoriesPage.mostPopularMeta: The category with the most products
categoriesPage.name: Category
categoriesPage.noStore: No store is linked to this account right now.
categoriesPage.empty: No categories yet. Add your first category.
categoriesPage.categoryTipBody: Use clear category names so customers can find products faster inside your store.
